Off Calendar May-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances:

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT GARY Y. SADA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support all causes for action. Marcia Sada's claims on behalf of the community are not barred by the pending dissolution case. Kristen and Geoffrey have standing to assert their claims. Contracts to be rescinded are sufficiently alleged. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)
